text.message: Ur letting the guy with better wheat production get the wheat port
can we help you plow blue?
u owe me a nb balck
u can block me now idm
you act as if thats a gracious thing to say lmap
im just saying its a video game
you know youre allowed to lie in catan?
thats not how friends play lol
it is and i generally support keeping your word
im not saying its against the rules
but not when someone is about to win
if u lie in catan u deserve perma block by the rest of the lobby
im just saying it will lose you many friends
then would u lie to someone for the win?
well black just a lost a friend for sure
when he robbed me over the guy whos about to win
lol u were never his friend in the first place
and u guy sare working together
we're not he just gave you a nb
and then robbed me immediately after
ill stop when im good and ready
im not surprised you want to stop though
its okay to admit youre just table talking
btw why did I get stolen from three consecutive times in the beginning?
need to test his devs lol
if he has knight he has to play it anyway
so no, he doesnt have to test them
well i guess the answer is he doesnt have it
ur abt to take army no?
i think blue might just have win in hand tho
i have never seen that before
theres no way u dont have army black
dont u have win in hand ?
he has 12 cards and an open settle
i think ur locked out of win
u need to pull the last vp
unless i get a pop yeah
i need my cards to pop
i knew u were lying lol
i have win in hand too
stolen from 3 times in a row
